title: hieracium murorum subsp. cuneatulum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. cuneatulum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its yellow flowers and edible leaves. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The leaves and flowers of Hieracium murorum subsp. cuneatulum can be prepared as herbal teas or infused in oil for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. However, due to a lack of comprehensive information, the specific health benefits and herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. cuneatulum are not well established.
